Interface IUNCircuitManager

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to a utility network circuit manager.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("4A1496A2-0B46-4BFF-BCF0-F3EF3B0DB2B5")]
public interface IUNCircuitManager

Properties

DomainNetworkName

Returns the domain network name.

string DomainNetworkName { get; }

Property Value

string
